title: Veeva and the Rolling Wave
cover_prompt: A small, round seal pup with soft silver fur curled on a floating piece of driftwood, rocking gently on moonlit ocean waves. The water glows with bioluminescent ripples, and the sky is a dreamy wash of deep blues and purples, dotted with tiny stars.
lyrics:
[verse]
Mm-loo loo, shh-vee vee
Nah-voh voh, pff-ah ah
Tss-mee mee, haa-noo noo
Dah-vee vee, mmm-ah ah

[verse]
Shaa-vee vee, luu-moh moh
Noh-vee vee, tss-ah ah
Haa-loo loo, shh-mee mee
Pff-voh voh, mmm-ah ah

[verse]
Mm-vee vee, nah-loo loo
Shaa-voh voh, tss-ah ah
Dah-mee mee, haa-noo noo
Luu-vee vee, mmm-ah ah
style_prompt: Traditional cradle song, warm maternal female vocal, harp arpeggios, 6/8 time signature, 64 BPM, swaying rocking rhythm, gentle lilting motion, the feeling of being carried and rocked, celtic lullaby influence, repetitive swinging pattern, soft cello accompaniment

character.name: Veeva
character.identity: A tiny, curious seal pup who rides the waves to lull the ocean to sleep.
character.special: Her gentle rocking never disturbs the water, only soothes it.

about: A swaying, ocean-inspired lullaby that mimics the gentle back-and-forth of waves. The lilting rhythm engages the vestibular system, helping little ones feel the soothing motion of rocking. Perfect for winding down active minds with the calming embrace of the sea.
